name: Exchange Set OabVirtualDirectory ExternalUrl Property
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jose Rodriguez @Cyb3rPandaH
SIGMA Title: Exchange Set OabVirtualDirectory ExternalUrl Property
SIGMA Description: Rule to detect an adversary setting OabVirtualDirectory External URL property to a script in Exchange Management log

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform, Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Defender for Cloud

when the event matches (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%set-oabvirtualdirectory%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%externalurl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%page_load%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%script%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Exchange Set OabVirtualDirectory ExternalUrl Property on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform, Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Defender for Cloud

AND when the event matches (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%set-oabvirtualdirectory%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%externalurl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%page_load%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%script%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Exchange Set OabVirtualDirectory ExternalUrl Property

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
